templates.name: .MikroTik Router
templates.description:
[netbox]
manufacturer = [ "MikroTik" ]
device_type = [ "CCR2004-16G-2S+", "CHR" ]
device_role = ["Core Router", "Edge Router", "Border Router", "Customer Premises Equipment Router"]

items.name: Get raw data
items.params: :local result "{\"data\":["; :local first true; :foreach n in=[/mpls ldp neighbor find] do={ :local neighborTransport [/mpls ldp neighbor get $n transport]; :local peer [/mpls ldp neighbor get $n peer]; :local route [/ip route find where dst-address="$neighborTransport/32"]; :if ([:len $route] > 0) do={ :local gateway [/ip route get $route gateway]; :local pct [:find $gateway "%"]; :local routeIface ""; :if ([:len $pct] > 0) do={ :set routeIface [:pick $gateway ($pct+1) [:len $gateway]] } else={ :set routeIface $gateway }; :if ($first = true) do={ :set first false } else={ :set result ($result . ",") }; :set result ($result . "{\"{#PEER}\":\"$peer\",\"{#INTERFACE}\":\"$routeIface\"}") } }; :set result ($result . "]}"); :put $result
